summary_text: - Runtime wiring is here: - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/user-prompt-submit-hook.sh` calls: `node "$HOME/.claude/scripts/kernel-author-memory-router.js"` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/scripts/kernel-author-memory-router.js` is the actual author-memory generation runtime entrypoint. - It writes/reads the runtime artifact cache under: - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/state/kernel-author-memory/latest.pack.md` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/state/kernel-author-memory/latest.pack.json` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/state/kernel-author-memory/latest.meta.json` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/state/kernel-author-memory/<hash>.pack.md` (and matching `.json`/`.meta.json`) - `philosophy.md` is currently a repo asset at: - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/philosophy.md` - and is intended for runtime loading via `/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md` (runtime doc path; this is the path existing adapter/operational docs already target). - Minimal change insertion point (single spot): - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/scripts/kernel-author-memory-router.js` add philosophy injection just before the router prints the final `AUTHOR_MEMORY_CONTEXT` block (so it can be prepended/merged with generated memory once per prompt, without touching hook wiring).
